name: Fast Money
description: Spin up a private/local-first client-ops SaaS starter, install the Fast Money AI bundle, and open an AI build session in one run.

fields.label: App name
fields.help: Customer-facing name for the generated SaaS.

fields.label: Brief
fields.default: Build a private/local-first client-ops SaaS for service businesses that turns leads into quotes, approvals, jobs, invoices, and renewals.
fields.placeholder: Who is this for and what should it sell?
fields.help: Short product brief for the AI build session.

fields.label: Output path
fields.help: Optional project folder. Blank creates the reference app under Synapse's data directory.

fields.label: Pricing model
fields.help: Recommended default is hybrid: base subscription plus AI-heavy usage overage.

fields.label: Include customer portal
fields.help: Create the customer-facing portal shell and navigation.

fields.label: Include employee console
fields.help: Create the operator/admin console shell and workflow dashboard.

fields.label: Include catalog editor
fields.help: Add a catalog editor shell when the business needs editable services or packages.
